transcript.text: Today's date is September 30th, 2015. It is 9.15 p.m. This is OCC Investigator Wechter at the OCC office.

and Sergeant Joseph Cummings in the room saying that you have a right to record.
And I've explained to you, as I did before, and as one of our attorneys has documented,
that you do not have a right to record because you're a witness only.

So I'm telling you, you cannot record.
And I'm telling you that you're not.

unless you could record, which you don't have a right to do,
that's our standard practice to submit the failure to comply notice.

We have no knowledge of that.
And we have no role whatsoever once we send that over.
